name: Gusto
description: Gusto is a cloud-based payroll, benefits, and HR platform for small and mid-size businesses. The API lets you manage companies, employees, contractors, payroll runs, and tax filings programmatically. It supports both embedded payroll integrations and standalone app connections.

capabilities.name: companies_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed company information including locations and pay schedules.

capabilities.name: companies_update
capabilities.description: Update a company's details.

capabilities.name: employees_list
capabilities.description: List all W-2 employees for a company.

capabilities.name: employees_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific employee with full profile and compensation.

capabilities.name: employees_create
capabilities.description: Add a new W-2 employee to a company.

capabilities.name: employees_update
capabilities.description: Update an employee's profile details.

capabilities.name: payrolls_list
capabilities.description: List all payroll runs for a company.

capabilities.name: payrolls_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific payroll run with employee earnings and deductions.

capabilities.name: payrolls_create
capabilities.description: Create an off-cycle payroll run.

capabilities.name: payrolls_calculate
capabilities.description: Calculate a payroll to compute wages, taxes, and deductions.

capabilities.name: payrolls_submit
capabilities.description: Submit a calculated payroll for processing.

capabilities.name: contractors_list
capabilities.description: List all 1099 contractors for a company.

capabilities.name: contractors_create
capabilities.description: Add a new 1099 contractor to a company.

capabilities.name: contractor_payments_list
capabilities.description: List all payments made to contractors.

capabilities.name: contractor_payments_create
capabilities.description: Process a payment for a contractor.

capabilities.name: locations_list
capabilities.description: List all company locations.

capabilities.name: locations_create
capabilities.description: Add a new location to a company.

capabilities.name: pay_schedules_list
capabilities.description: List all pay schedules for a company.

capabilities.name: company_benefits_list
capabilities.description: List all benefits configured for a company.

capabilities.name: employee_benefits_list
capabilities.description: List all benefit enrollments for an employee.

capabilities.name: time_off_policies_list
capabilities.description: List all time off policies for a company.

capabilities.name: departments_list
capabilities.description: List all departments in a company.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhook subscriptions.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook subscription for payroll, employee, or company events.
